sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْبِئْرُ فِي وَسَطِ الْقَرْيَةِ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Bunar u središtu sela bio je veoma važan.
sentences.translationEn: The well in the centre of the village was very important.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَجْتَمِعُونَ عِنْدَهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su se skupljali oko njega svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The people would gather around it every day.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَتِ النِّسَاءُ الْمَاءَ فِي جِرَارٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Žene su uzimale vodu u velikim loncima.
sentences.translationEn: The women took water in large jars.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَاءُ الْبَارِدُ مِنَ الْبِئْرِ لَذِيذًا فِي الصَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Hladna voda iz bunara bila je ukusna ljeti.
sentences.translationEn: The cold water from the well was delicious in summer.
